The data size(row x col) is:(15 x 3)
Week(P_ORDER_DATETIME), DayOfMonth(ORDER_DATETIME), Sum(CUSTOMER_ID)
2004-09-26 00:00:00, 2, 29
2004-09-26 00:00:00, 28, 13
2004-10-10 00:00:00, 13, 29
2004-10-10 00:00:00, 15, 30
2004-10-24 00:00:00, 26, 20
2004-10-24 00:00:00, 30, 46
2005-03-13 00:00:00, 13, 90
2005-03-13 00:00:00, 15, 8
2005-03-13 00:00:00, 17, 46
2005-03-20 00:00:00, 21, 9
2005-03-20 00:00:00, 23, 35
2005-03-20 00:00:00, 26, 12
2005-03-27 00:00:00, 27, 6
2005-03-27 00:00:00, 31, 3
